summary: Comprehensive testing of Patron/Founders and Executive Council feature completed successfully. All 12 backend API tests passed. Public About page displays 6 founders and 19 council members (5 officers + 14 EC members in table). Admin panel has two tabs with full CRUD capabilities and member search functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: Founders and Council entries properly linked to member_ids
Public endpoints correctly filter by category (founder vs council)
Admin API properly supports category filter parameter
Seed data creates 20 members + 6 founders + 19 council entries as expected
Member search in Add modal shows approved members with membership_id
seed_data_creation: Backend startup seeds 20 members + 6 founders + 19 council entries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Founders/Executive Council feature fully tested. Public About page has founders-section and executive-council-section data-testids. Admin Executive Committee page has tabs (tab-founder, tab-council), table with executive-row testids, and add modal with search-member-input and member-option testids.

backend_tests: GET /api/public/executive - returns 19 council members with category=council
POST /api/admin/executive - create founder entry with category=founder
POST /api/admin/executive - create council entry with category=council
POST /api/admin/executive - create entry with member_id linked
Verify 20 seed members exist with status=approved
frontend_tests: Public About page - Patron/Founders section with 6 founder cards
Public About page - Executive Council section with 5 officer cards
Public About page - EC Members table with S.No, Name, Affiliation columns
Public About page - 14 EC Member rows in table
Admin Executive Committee - Two tabs (Patron/Founders and Executive Council)
Admin Executive Committee - Founders tab shows 6 entries with edit/delete
Admin Executive Committee - Council tab shows 19 entries with edit/delete
Admin Executive Committee - All entries show 'Linked' member status
Admin Executive Committee - Add modal has member search functionality
Admin Executive Committee - Member search dropdown shows approved members with IDSEA IDs

public_about_page.founders_section: 6 founders with names and affiliations displayed in cards
public_about_page.executive_council_section: 5 officers as cards with designation badges
public_about_page.ec_members_table: 14 EC members in table with S.No, Name, Affiliation

admin_executive_page.tabs: Two tabs - Patron/Founders (6) and Executive Council (19)
admin_executive_page.crud: Edit and Delete buttons for each entry
admin_executive_page.add_modal: Member search, designation dropdown, affiliation, order, photo_url, profile fields
admin_executive_page.member_linking: All entries show 'Linked' indicating member_id connection

backend_api.crud_operations: POST, PUT, DELETE working with category and member_id fields

mocked_apis.details: All APIs connect to real MongoDB. No mocked endpoints.
